panels.title: Overall Health
panels.description: NAS + DB guard + sync timer + video timer + Flask all green = Healthy

panels.title: Stale Local DB
panels.description: 1 = project-root fathom.db exists and must not be used

panels.title: Latest Sync Age
panels.description: Seconds since last successful sync

panels.title: Sync Processes Running
panels.description: Should be 0 (idle) or 1 (running). Alert if >1.

panels.title: Total Meetings
panels.description: Total rows in meetings table. Should only ever increase.

panels.title: Coverage Trend
panels.description: All three coverage metrics over the selected time range

panels.title: Missing Summaries
panels.description: Meetings without a summary — approximate backfill count

panels.title: Count Trend — Meetings, Videos, Transcripts, Summaries
DB Size
panels.description: Live production DB file size

panels.title: Daily Audit
panels.description: 1 = audit timer active and reporting; 0 = not yet enabled

panels.title: DB Integrity
panels.description: SQLite PRAGMA integrity_check result (1=ok, 0=corrupt, -1=not run)

panels.title: Regression Detected
panels.description: 1 if any DB regression (size↓, inode swap, checksum change, count↓, corruption) detected this run

panels.title: Inode Changed
panels.description: 1 if DB inode changed since last run (possible file swap)

panels.title: Checksum Changed
panels.description: 1 if partial SHA-256 changed since last run

panels.title: DB Size Delta
panels.description: Change in DB file size since last run (bytes)

panels.title: Meeting Count Delta
panels.description: Change in total meetings since last run

panels.title: Video Delta
panels.description: Change in has_video count since last run

panels.title: Transcript Delta
panels.description: Change in has_transcript count since last run

panels.title: Summary Delta
panels.description: Change in has_summary count since last run

panels.title: DB mtime
panels.description: Last modification time of DB file (Unix timestamp)

panels.title: Count Delta vs 6h Ago (negative = data loss)
panels.description: Alert fires when any series drops below -100. Requires 6h of TSDB history.

panels.title: DB Fingerprint Changed
panels.description: 1 = inode or checksum changed since last run — possible file swap or DB replacement

panels.title: Summary Coverage Drop vs 6h Ago
panels.description: Alert fires when coverage drops > 5% in 6h. Negative = coverage shrinking.

panels.title: Failed Systemd Units
panels.description: Shows any Fathom unit that is not active
